productDisplayName: Puma Men Usain Bolt Black Tshirts
description: Composition Black round neck short sleeved t-shirt made of 57% cotton, 38% polyester and 5% elastane, has a softly ribbed neckline with fabric tape detailing on the inseam, brand logo embossed at the back of the neck, collection logo printed on left sleeve, graphic print on the front with lettering and engineered with USP moisture management technology Fitting Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash with like colours in cool water at 30 degrees Do not bleach or tumble dry Cool iron Do not dry clean Pay tribute to Usain Bolt in this black t-shirt from puma. Salute the Jamaican sprinter and Olympic champion as you chill out in this smart tee. The USP Moisture Management Technology will keep sweat at bay, and the elastane will give you a great Fit. Pair it with jeans or shorts for a great look. Take a leaf out of his book and sprint to freedom! Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6', Shoulders-19"
